title: Body Parsing, Raw Webhooks, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Byte Limits · Compiler Case: Urlencoded Multipart Files
summary: Parsers accept decompression bombs, req.body is assumed present, raw webhook bytes are lost, multipart data is buffered without caps, and aborted uploads leak work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts urlencoded multipart files increment in bounded body ownership and parser matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound URL-encoded parameters and stream multipart parts with filename, type, count, size, storage, scanning, cleanup, and path authority controls.
Preserve exact raw bytes for signature verification while separating timestamp, replay, media type, decode, validation, and enqueue decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
